Bootstrap the standard error of the median

Source: R/clustering.R
bootstrap_median.Rd

Bootstrap the standard error of the median

Usage

bootstrap_median(data, num)

Arguments

data

Numeric vector

num

Number of bootstraps

Value

out The bootstrap estimate of the median

Examples

bootstrap_median(rnorm(50), num = 100)
#> $std.err
#> [1] 0.1826979
#> 
#> $resamples
#> $resamples[[1]]
#>  [1] -0.85520250  0.06730444  0.42656655  0.84618466  0.06730444  0.60361101
#>  [7]  0.22712713  0.97845492  1.07283825 -0.79554143  0.42656655  0.60361101
#> [13]  1.67288261  0.89496163 -0.44179945  0.19214942  1.07283825 -1.39941046
#> [19]  0.94634789 -0.79554143  1.04871262 -0.53666333 -0.85520250 -1.75627543

#> [31]  0.94634789  2.12685046 -0.85520250  0.60361101 -0.69053790  0.02229473
